name: Accessibility Check
description: Verify WCAG 2.1 AA compliance when writing React components

then.prompt: If writing a React component (.tsx), verify WCAG 2.1 AA compliance: 1) Interactive elements have aria-label or aria-labelledby. 2) Images have meaningful alt text. 3) Buttons/links have accessible names. 4) Form inputs have associated labels. 5) Color contrast meets 4.5:1 ratio for text. 6) Keyboard navigation is supported. If issues found, fix them before writing.
